audit_factor.reason: Round244 showed a negative 5-day raw IC clue; the sign flip is preregistered and counted as a new hypothesis test instead of being treated as a free discovery.

horizon_results.interpretation: FDR and size/liquidity-neutral checks are positive, but the industry-neutral t-stat is below the gate; watchlist only.

decision.reason: The 5-day sign flip passed multiple-testing significance but failed the industry-neutral gate and remains below ICIR robustness expectations.

blocked_actions: Do not promote the sign flip as a discovered factor.
Do not run portfolio grids or walk-forward from this audit alone.
Do not continue tuning this sign flip without a preregistered industry-neutral repair and explicit hypothesis count.
allowed_next_actions: Rotate Round246 to post-statement announcement drift or profitability revision surprise.
Optionally keep this sign flip on a watchlist until a larger PIT statement universe is available, but do not spend another full mining round on it now.
If revisited, require an industry-neutral repair and treat it as a new hypothesis.
safety: Research-to-review only. No broker connection, no account reads, no order placement, no live trading.
